papers.title: How Do VLMs Fail? Vision-Operation Misalignment in Compositional VQA
papers.authors: Navya Gupta, Bingjie Xu, Avinash Anand, Timothy Liu, Zhengchen Zhang
papers.method: Operation-centric mechanistic framework with causal interventions across transformer layers
papers.reproduction_focus: Failure mode classification (grounding/reasoning/attribute_extraction/language_prior), pathway dissociation via causal intervention (FFN vs attention ablation)

papers.title: IMEX Schemes for Compressible Flow using Hybridizable Discontinuous Galerkin Methods
papers.authors: Jan Ellmenreich, Edmond K. Shehadi, Philip L. Lederer
papers.method: Geometry-split IMEX framework: implicit HDG for stiff regions + explicit DG for non-stiff regions, ARK temporal coupling
papers.reproduction_focus: 1D compressible Euler equations, grid convergence, explicit vs IMEX performance, CFL stability limits

papers.title: Reducing Power Consumption of Embedded Dynamic Memories with ECCs
papers.authors: Wenqing Song, Yifei Shen, Andreas Burg
papers.method: ECC selection combining refresh-interval model with power analysis to minimize total power under yield constraints
papers.reproduction_focus: GCRAM retention distribution, ECC power trade-off, optimal ECC selection across bandwidths/activity factors

papers.title: Rendering 3D Gaussians on a Graph Processor
papers.authors: Nicholas Fry, Ignacio Alzugaray, Mark Pupilli, Paul H. J. Kelly, Andrew J. Davison
papers.method: BSP-model tiled 3D Gaussian splatting on 1472-tile IPU with NEWS-grid inter-tile routing, SRAM-only rendering
papers.reproduction_focus: Tile routing via Manhattan hops, BSP communication phases, SRAM constraint analysis, scalability with gaussian count

papers.title: Operation and performance of ProtoDUNE Dual Phase liquid argon time projection chamber
papers.method: 6x6x6m dual-phase LArTPC: vertical electron drift, gas-phase Townsend amplification, multi-wire charge readout
papers.reproduction_focus: Electron drift survival/diffusion, Townsend avalanche gain, charge readout SNR, detection efficiency, cathode field uniformity
